docket_entries.description: OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FILED-COURT DATE IS 3/23/94 9AM DEPT.6 RM 376.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ORANGE COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $377.30 AS TO DEFENDANT GRATCH RUDOLF
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ORANGE COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GRATCH RUDOLF
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GRATCH RUDOLF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHIP/ART INTERNATIONAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRATCH RUDOLF $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $119.10 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $369.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORIG CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FROM ORANGE COUNTY FILED.
THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS ORDERE DENIED. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $270.27 FILED BY SHIP/ART INTERNATIONAL AS TO DEFENDANT GRATCH RUDOLF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
